data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the cancellation of an initial booking affects downstream appointments. While the linked use case describes that downstream appointments are auto-canceled if the bleach step is canceled, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this behavior is implemented in the system. The evidence does not demonstrate that the cancellation of the initial booking leads to the expected downstream effects, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the cancellation of the initial booking leads to the auto-cancellation of downstream appointments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
